## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior, internal boundary, or documentation area changed by this pull request.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] Manual browser check, when UI/canvas/export behavior changed
- [ ] `bun run export:audit`, if export fidelity changed

## Notes

Call out export fidelity risks, localStorage migrations, accessibility implications, or follow-up work.
